item.title: RIP Maggie
item.description: Known to a younger generation as Professor McGonagall, Dame Maggie Smith has sadly passed away aged 89 :( RIP Maggie. https://abc7ny.com/post/actress-maggie-smith-known-professor-mcgonagall-harry-potter-downton-abbey-has-died/15363402/
item.dc:creator: Cust4rdcream

item.title: Deviousness Day 141
item.description:
super busy irl getting ready to move and also saw a meme that made me be like. I should post. so enjoy!
The above image was made by the wonderful CammyJay! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share artwork and on fridays do drawings based on word prompts given by members. I has a Deviousness discord server! We have a general area for memes and discussions of all different SFWish topics! We have gaming fun! I am really bad about running events and being consistent. I do randomly show up in vc and game. All are welcome who want to game or watch us game or just hang out feel free to hop into the vc. please do be respectful if we are in game let us chat for the game. We have an opt in kink area for dirtier conversations and then a role locked area for deeper kink discussions! (It is role locked because we take privacy and security very seriously and the discord is a place with real people sharing and things being shared is a privilege) Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness nm we lost a boost so here is dis linky: https://discord.gg/pM6KmS4T83 Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
I love you *my* Daddy. Friendly reminder I am claimed so I would appreciate keeping that in mind when making comments towards me see dis: https://imgur.com/JipV5UR I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe I am changing how I add people to my ping list so please see here to get added or removed: https://imgur.com/a/fFYOR2B there is now the option on desktop to follow when someone posts so feel free to do that and lemme know and I can remove you from the ping list. I dont think I will get rid of it entirely so if you prefer the special feeling of getting a ping it will also continue to be an option.
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: His own platform calling out his bullshit.
item.description: Fact checking Elon needs to happen more. He has become unhinged with ego and delusions of influence. Hard to believe the world's richest man chooses to spend his time acting as an internet troll, but heck, that's 2024 baby.

item.dc:creator: Cheerfulinsanity

item.title: Let's help Imgurians in need
item.description:
Hey it's MrPuckett here super excited for TheFreePizzaDude post today! If you'd like to help an Imgurian in need get some food, here's how it works -
You can find a request for food in the comments, reply to them and then send a DM to get an order set up Or you can contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and we will send the food for you!
Anonymous Angels have been such a huge part of us being able to help more people, we love you - https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
And here's how you'd send it yourself! Any questions as an Angel? Just shoot us a message! We'll be on this username until 7pm central
My foster Lily is here to show you how it works for requests
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area
Any questions as a requestor? Just leave a comment! We'll have helpers on the post for 6 hours
14,316 meals since we started 887 grocery orders sent 6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going! ... Today's Pizza Tally 130 1st and 2nd by Pizza Angel @BadPunsAplenty 140 3rd, 4th, 5th and 6th by @OP 220 7th, 8th, 9th and 10th by @OP 250 11th, 12th and 13th by Pizza Angel @AyatollahBahloni 330 14th, 15th, 16th and 17th by @OP 400 18th by Pizza Angel @RobertBunda 415 19th by Pizza Angel @IAmTheKingOfCheese 435 20th, 21st, 22nd and Michael Jordan by @OP 450 Kobe Bryant and 25th by Pizza Angel @MedCityMoto 515 25th by Pizza Angel @CausticPrincess 540 26th, 27th, 28th and 29th by @OP 550 30th and 31st by Pizza Angel @grim42 600 32nd by Pizza Angel @SlimeWire 605 33rd by Pizza Angel @spoonassassin 610 34th by Pizza Angel @pot314 615 35th and 36th by Pizza Angel @grim42 618 37th by Pizza Angel @IMPICKLERICK 620 38th by Pizza Angel @MedCityMoto 630 39th, 40th and 41st by Pizza Angel @IrvingSchwinglepuck 635 The Meaning of Life, the Universe, and Everything by Pizza Angel @OuchYoureOnMyHair 655 43rd by Pizza Angel @rawrberry ... Today's Grocery Tally 240 1st by Grocery Angel @TheCraicen 300 2nd by Grocery Angel @TheCraicen 605 3rd by @OP ... Alright everyone that's it for @OP Today we sent out 43 meals Filled 3 huge grocery orders That's 14,359 meals since we started 890 grocery orders sent Well done everyone, see you next week!
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude

item.title: This gnarly rock formation is known as Wave Rock (Western Australia)
item.description: Standing about 15 meters (49 feet) high and 110 meters (360 feet) long, the unique shape was formed over millions of years through erosion and rainwater, which also created the stripes. Around 2.7 billion years old, Wave Rock isn’t just a geological marvel. It holds cultural importance for the local Aboriginal communities and is a popular tourist destination.
item.dc:creator: trustfallaccident

item.title: Images of Note: Opossums
item.description:
Not gonna lie, this looks like a device I would design when I was ten, but made real, and it uses KDE.
OxO
BORIS JOHNSON CONSIDERED INVADING THE NETHERLANDS!
PASMS
oh no
I should watch mash
Ball Removal
We need to bring back insane fashion.
o - o
It's almost like republicans are using forced or coerced reproduction as a way to control people.
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging

item.title: Maggie Smith, 1934-2024
item.description: Rest in peace you wonderful actress and person.
item.dc:creator: drGrafenberg

item.title: Tribute to the Late Maggie Smith
item.dc:creator: StevieTheAussie

item.title: NOOooo!
item.description:
Maggie Smith, the incomparable Dowager Countess and Professor McGonagall, has "caught a train." RIP: 1934-2024 I played a character for community theatre and one of the directors said, "every time I see him on stage, he reminds me more and more of this cranky ol' lady on Downton Abbey." Best review I ever got. I'll always love you Ms. Smith. Thank you for everything.
Press photo 1973
Downton Abbey still
item.dc:creator: elhigh

item.title: Mentally healthy dump
item.description:
@Corwel You posted this a couple years back I think and it meant a lot to me. I saved it. I don't know if you're still on here but, thanks for posting it. It helped. I love you too.
Tell me something from your week. It doesn't have to be happy or emotionally heavy or anything, just if you want to share something from your week, I would love to hear it. -comet Also here's the rest of the MHDs. https://imgur.com/user/iamthecomet/favorites/folder/11693845/mentally-healthy
item.dc:creator: iamthecomet
